summary: Stage 32.2 Testing Complete - Currency Selector, Cron APIs with Vercel support, RLS SQL script, and vercel.json all verified. 11/11 backend tests passed, frontend currency selector working with localStorage persistence.

minor.issue: Fixed: Was using PAID_ESCROW status which doesn't exist in booking_status enum. Changed to ['PAID', 'CONFIRMED']

passed_tests.test: Currency Selector dropdown opens with all 6 currencies
passed_tests.result: PASS - THB, USD, RUB, CNY, EUR, GBP all available with flags
PASS - Button updates to show selected currency flag and symbol
PASS - Returns success:true with 24H Rule message

passed_tests.test: Payout cron accepts Bearer token authorization

passed_tests.result: PASS - Returns 24H rule status, readyForPayout, upcomingThaw
PASS - Returns todayCheckIns count and scheduledTime
PASS - /app/vercel.json with checkin-reminder at 07:00 UTC and payouts at 11:00 UTC

passed_tests.test: Homepage loads with listings and currency selector
passed_tests.result: PASS - 5 listings with Book Now buttons, currency selector in header

critical_code_review_comments: RLS SQL script needs to be manually applied in Supabase SQL Editor - the script is ready but not auto-applied
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 32.2 fully verified. Currency Selector component integrated in header with 6 currencies (THB, USD, RUB, CNY, EUR, GBP), flags, and localStorage persistence via 'funnyrent_currency' key. Cron APIs support Vercel cron header (x-vercel-cron), x-cron-secret header, and Bearer token auth. vercel.json configured for 07:00 UTC (checkin-reminder) and 11:00 UTC (payouts). RLS SQL script at /app/database/rls_policies.sql needs manual application in Supabase.

bug_fixes_applied.issue: Line 49 and 132: PAID_ESCROW is not a valid booking_status enum value
bug_fixes_applied.reason: The booking_status enum only contains: PENDING, CONFIRMED, PAID, CANCELLED, COMPLETED, REFUNDED
